response.justification: Bogdan is a highly capable Staff Software Engineer with strong backend and distributed systems expertise, but he lacks the requisite executive leadership background for a CTO position. His resume shows no experience scaling engineering organizations from 10 to 30+ people, managing external delivery partners, or architecting complex AI-driven credit risk and algorithmic trading systems at an executive level.
strengths: Strong hands-on backend engineering experience, including high-throughput microservices handling millions of requests per second.
Recent practical exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling, including Model Context Protocol (MCP).
Deep commitment to software craftsmanship, test-driven development (TDD), and building reliable distributed systems.
concerns: Zero executive-level engineering leadership experience; career history consists entirely of individual contributor roles.
No demonstrated track record of scaling engineering organizations, developing technical leadership layers, or managing outsourced teams.
Lacks the required domain expertise in algorithmic working-capital allocation and real-time credit-risk assessment.
